body:
In **Alameda County, California** , a typical professional garage door spring replacement costs:

  * **$200–$350** for a standard single-door garage with one or two extension springs.

  * **$250–$450** for torsion spring replacement (the most common type on modern garage doors).

  * **$350–$550** if both torsion springs on a double-width door are replaced together, which is often recommended because springs usually wear at similar rates. [Garage Door Spring Replacement Cost (2026 Guide) — CostPatch](https://costpatch.com/garage-door-spring-replacement/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Garage Door Spring Replacement Cost in Oakland, California](https://www.homeblue.com/garage-door-spring/oakland-ca-garage-door-spring-replacement-cost.htm?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

Several factors can affect the final price:

  * **Spring type:** Torsion springs cost more than extension springs.

  * **Door size and weight:** Heavier insulated or wood doors require larger springs.

  * **Emergency or weekend service:** Often adds **$50–$150**.

  * **High-cycle springs:** Upgrading to longer-lasting springs typically adds **$30–$80** per spring but can significantly extend service life. [Garage Door Spring Replacement Cost (2026 Guide) — CostPatch](https://costpatch.com/garage-door-spring-replacement/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If you're looking for local service, well-reviewed companies in Alameda County include:

  * All Bay Garage Doors (San Leandro)

  * Integrity Garage Doors & Gates (Hayward)

  * Best & Local Garage Door & Automatic Gate Services (Alameda)

  * Gil's Garage Door & Gate Services (serving Berkeley and nearby areas)

A few companies advertise very low "starting at" prices (such as **$69**), but those are often for the spring itself or promotional pricing and may not include labor, service call fees, or the correct spring for your door. A realistic all-in price for most homeowners in Alameda County is usually **$250–$450**. [Garage Door Repair Alameda County & Automatic Gate - Best & Local](https://www.best-and-local.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Garage Door Spring Replacement Cost (2026 Guide) — CostPatch](https://costpatch.com/garage-door-spring-replacement/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If you can tell me:

  * whether your door is **single or double** , and

  * whether it uses **torsion springs** (mounted above the door) or **extension springs** (along the tracks),

I can give you a more specific expected price range.  

Give feedback
